title: Savory Dense Jamaican Mozzarella Casserole
description: A rich, dense, and savory Jamaican-inspired casserole featuring mozzarella cheese, jerk seasoning, and a blend of spices, perfect for a comforting dinner. This halal-friendly dish is sure to satisfy your cravings.
instructions: In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the chopped onion and bell pepper, and cook until they are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped scotch bonnet peppers, jerk seasoning, salt, and black pepper to the skillet, and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked onion and pepper mixture, breadcrumbs, and flour.
In a separate bowl, mix the shredded mozzarella cheese.

In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of the breadcrumb mixture, followed by a layer of the mozzarella cheese. Repeat this process until all the ingredients are used up, finishing with a layer of cheese on top.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and broil the casserole for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
